label: plain_text
text:
A quadratic equation in the variable x is an equation of the form ax² + bx + c =0, where
a, b, c are real
numbers, a ≠ 0. For example, 2x² +
+ x - 300 = 0 is a quadratic equation.
Similarly, 2x² - 3x + 1 = 0, 4x - 3x² + 2 = 0
and 1 - x² + 300 = 0
are
also quadratic
equations.
